data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplifies user choice by limiting options to enhance decision-making speed.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Ensures that clickable areas are large and easy to access, enhancing usability.

data.title: Gestalt Principles
data.description: Applies principles such as proximity and similarity to create a cohesive interaction pattern.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Limits the amount of information displayed at once to prevent cognitive overload.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Aligns user experience with familiar paths to enhance user expectations and ease of use.
